title: Speed Calculator - Speed Distance Time
description: Free speed calculator. Calculate speed, distance, or time given any two of the three values.
keywords: speed calculator, distance calculator, time calculator, speed distance time
intro: Calculate speed, distance, or time by providing any two values. Speed = Distance ÷ Time.

faq.a: Speed = Distance / Time. Rearranged: Distance = Speed × Time, and Time = Distance / Speed.
Speed in m/s, km/h, or mph. Distance in meters, kilometers, or miles. Time in hours, minutes, and seconds.
